labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 712110 ($5,133,657,528) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 712110 ($13,583,796,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1664 (margins.json[71]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Recreation EBITDA/Sales 16.64%); revenue/employee $159,939 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 712110); class <5: 2,998 firms, avg revenue/firm $248,731 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $41,389 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 906 firms, avg revenue/firm $670,305 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $111,539 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 573 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,515,403 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $252,163 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 606 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,539,627 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $921,794 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 172 firms, avg revenue/firm $30,125,645 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,012,907 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 23 firms, avg revenue/firm $122,776,174 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $20,429,955 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 172
